name: Broiled Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes and remove the stem ends.
2. Cut each tomato in half.
3. Place the halved tomatoes in a greased shallow baking dish.
4. Add salt, pepper, and melted butter or other fat to season the tomatoes.
5. Place the dish under the flame of a boiling oven, ensuring it is far enough from the heat so the tomatoes can cook before browning.
6. Broil for 20 to 30 minutes, or until the tomatoes are tender and lightly browned.
7. Serve hot with parsley garnished on crisp buttered toast.
